content:
Just now

--

A system becomes mature when it stops treating repetition as work.
Press enter or click to view image in full size

Memory refused recalculation.
Databases refused repeated search.
Indexes refused repeated scanning.
CDNs refused repeated transfer.
Caches refused repeated fetching.
But frontend delivery still accepts a strange premise:
that production knowledge should be rediscovered again and again.
The dependency graph is known.
The export surface is known.
The artifacts are known.
The readiness proof can be known.
And yet every developer machine, every CI run, every preview, every production build is often asked to rediscover the same truth.
Ionify starts with a refusal:
a build system should not only execute.
It should remember.
